_meta.cycle_disposition_reason: Weekly research bundle contains multiple new developments including JNIM-Tuareg strikes killing Mali Defense Minister, Russia 666-drone strike, US-Iran talks collapse, Hamas rejection of disarmament.

lead_signal.headline: JNIM-Tuareg coordinated offensive strikes Mali capital Bamako killing Defense Minister Sadio Camara in most significant Sahel escalation of 2026
lead_signal.body: Al-Qaeda-linked JNIM and Tuareg separatist FLA launched attacks on Bamako, Kati, Gao, Kidal, and Sevaree on April 25. Defense Minister General Sadio Camara killed when his residence destroyed. Demonstrates unprecedented jihadist-ethno-nationalist cooperation amid Russian Africa Corps withdrawal from Kidal.

module_0.title: JNIM-Tuareg strikes kill Mali Defense Minister in coordinated Sahel escalation
module_0.body: Al-Qaeda JNIM and FLA Tuareg separatists struck Bamako and multiple cities April 25 killing Defense Minister Sadio Camara. FLA claimed Kidal control post-Russian withdrawal. Most significant Sahel escalation 2026 signals jihadist-separatist cooperation. Watch Russian mercenary posture and Wagner successor dynamics.
